name: ESG Pre-Screening
description: Adds environmental, social, and governance screening to the acquisition underwriting process. Checks for GRESB alignment, carbon audit flags, and social impact indicators.
rationale: Institutional investors increasingly require ESG screening as part of the investment process. This template adds a structured ESG assessment step between T-12 normalization and proforma construction.

replacements.replace:
### Step 4: ESG Pre-Screen
Assess the following ESG dimensions:

**Environmental:**
- Energy Star score (if available) or estimated energy intensity
- Known environmental contamination or remediation history
- Proximity to flood zones (FEMA Zone A/V)
- Local Building Performance Standard compliance (NYC LL97, DC BEPS, Boston BERDO)
- Estimated carbon intensity (kgCO2e/SF/year)

**Social:**
- Affordable housing component or rent-restricted units
- Tenant demographic stability
- Proximity to transit, schools, healthcare
- Community benefit obligations

**Governance:**
- Property management track record on safety/compliance
- Outstanding code violations
- ADA compliance status

**ESG Verdict:** GREEN (no flags) / YELLOW (manageable flags) / RED (material ESG risk)
If RED, add ESG remediation costs to Sources & Uses.

### Step 5: Operating Proforma
